description_long: This object is a pair of scissors featuring two elongated, sharp metal blades joined at a central pivot point. The handles are made of black plastic, molded into two oval loops for finger placement, and are symmetrical in design. The blades are metallic, with a smooth, slightly reflective finish, and taper to a pointed tip for precision cutting. The central joint is secured with a visible metal rivet, providing a stable pivot for the opening and closing motion. The overall construction appears lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for general-purpose cutting tasks. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of black-handled scissors with pointed metal blades and a central rivet joint, designed for precise cutting tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical black handles and the pointed metal blades converging at the tip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blades and the overlapping handle loops.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open finger loops and the alignment of the blades from the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flatness of the blades and the handle contours.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical oval plastic handles, ambidextrous, not padded or coated, standard smooth grip.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible metal rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard fixed pivot.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized oval loops, smooth surface, no soft inserts or anatomical contours, accommodates standard finger placement.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips, designed for precision cutting.
